zh.Radcliffe, Lancashire, England: 英國藍卡爾拉德克利夫
zh.Silkstone, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾希爾可斯同
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de Montbegon於大約1160年出生在英國藍卡爾蘭卡斯特時，她的父親Adam de Montbegon22歲，母親Matilda FitzSwain26歲。她和Edward or Ailward de Bury至少有1個兒子。她去世於1225年在英國藍卡爾拉德克利夫享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice de Montbegon于大约1160年出生在英国藍卡爾蘭卡斯特时，她的父亲Adam de Montbegon22岁，母亲Matilda FitzSwain26岁。她和Edward or Ailward de Bury至少有1个儿子。她去世于1225年在英国藍卡爾拉德克利夫享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de Montbegon was born about 1160, in Lancaster, Lancashire, England, her father, Adam de Montbegon, was 22 and her mother, Matilda FitzSwain, was 26. She had at least 1 son with Edward or Ailward de Bury. She died in 1225, in Radcliffe, Lancashire, England, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice de Montbegon est née environ 1160, à Lancaster, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Adam de Montbegon, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Matilda FitzSwain, avait 26 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Edward or Ailward de Bury. Elle est décédée en 1225, à Radcliffe, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice de Montbegon um 1160 in Lancaster, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Adam de Montbegon 22 und ihre Mutter Matilda FitzSwain 26. Sie hatte mit Edward or Ailward de Bury mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1225 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Radcliffe, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Montbegon è nata il circa 1160 nel Lancaster, Lancashire, England, sua padre, Adam de Montbegon, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Matilda FitzSwain, aveva 26 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Edward or Ailward de Bury. Morì nel 1225, nel Radcliffe, Lancashire, England, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice de Montbegonが約1160年にイギリスランカシュアイアランカスターで生まれた時，父Adam de Montbegonは22歳，母Matilda FitzSwainは26歳であった。彼女はEdward or Ailward de Buryとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1225年にイギリスランカシュアイアラドクリフで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Montbegon(이)가 대략 1160년 영국 랭카실르 랭커스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Adam de Montbegon(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda FitzSwain(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 Edward or Ailward de Bury(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1225년 영국 랭카실르 라드클리프에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Montbegon nasceu aproximadamente 1160, em Lancaster, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Adam de Montbegon, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Matilda FitzSwain, tinha 26 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Edward or Ailward de Bury. Ela faleceu em 1225, em Radcliffe, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice de Montbegon родилась около 1160 г. в местности ланкастир, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Adam de Montbegon было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Matilda FitzSwain, 26. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Edward or Ailward de Bury. Она умерла в 1225 г. в местности радклифф, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice de Montbegon nació aproximadamente 1160, en Lancaster, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Adam de Montbegon, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Matilda FitzSwain, tenía 26 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Edward or Ailward de Bury. Murió en 1225, en Radcliffe, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 66 años.
